mapper.select: SELECT wl.WD_REASON_DESC, wl.WD_REG_DATE, cc.CMM_CD_NAME FROM MEMBER_WITHDRAWAL_LOG wl LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE cc ON wl.WD_REASON_CD = cc.CMM_CD WHERE wl.MBR_ID = #{mbrId} ORDER BY wl.WD_REG_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: /* 🚀 관리자 회원 상태 변경 이력 저장 */ INSERT INTO MEMBER_STATUS_LOG ( MSL_MBR_ID, MSL_ADMIN_ID, MSL_TARGET_STATUS, MSL_REASON, MSL_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{mbrId}, #{adminId}, #{targetStatus}, #{reason}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO MEMBER_WITHDRAWAL_LOG ( MBR_ID, WD_REASON_CD, WD_REASON_DESC, WD_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{mbrId}, #{reasonCd}, #{reasonDesc}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
/* 🚀 관리자 전용: 들어온(null이 아닌) 데이터만 쏙쏙 골라서 업데이트 (Null Overwrite 완벽 방어) */ UPDATE MEMBER
MBR_NAME = #{mbrName},
MBR_NICKNAME = #{mbrNickname},
MBR_TELNO = #{mbrTelno},
MBR_ZIP = #{mbrZip},
MBR_ADDR = #{mbrAddr},
MBR_DADDR = #{mbrDaddr},
MBR_AUTH_CD = #{mbrAuthCd},
MBR_USE_YN = #{mbrUseYn},
MBR_PASSWORD = #{mbrPassword}
WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId}
mapper.select:
SELECT *,
(SELECT MSL_REASON FROM MEMBER_STATUS_LOG WHERE MSL_MBR_ID = MEMBER.MBR_ID AND MSL_TARGET_STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY MSL_REG_DATE DESC LIMIT 1) AS suspendReason FROM MEMBER WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId}

SELECT M.*, -- 프로필 이미지 정보 (별칭: PF_) PF.FILE_ORG_NM AS PF_FILE_ORG_NM, PF.FILE_SAVE_NM AS PF_FILE_SAVE_NM, PF.FILE_PATH AS PF_FILE_PATH, PF.FILE_EXT AS PF_FILE_EXT, PF.FILE_SIZE AS PF_FILE_SIZE, PF.FILE_MIME_TYPE AS PF_FILE_MIME_TYPE, PF.FILE_TYPE AS PF_FILE_TYPE,
-- 배경 이미지 정보 (별칭: BG_) BF.FILE_ORG_NM AS BG_FILE_ORG_NM, BF.FILE_SAVE_NM AS BG_FILE_SAVE_NM, BF.FILE_PATH AS BG_FILE_PATH, BF.FILE_EXT AS BG_FILE_EXT, BF.FILE_SIZE AS BG_FILE_SIZE, BF.FILE_MIME_TYPE AS BG_FILE_MIME_TYPE, BF.FILE_TYPE AS BG_FILE_TYPE FROM MEMBER M -- 프로필 파일 조인 LEFT JOIN FILE PF ON M.MBR_PROFILE_FILE_NO = PF.FILE_NO AND PF.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' -- 배경 파일 조인 LEFT JOIN FILE BF ON M.MBR_PROFILE_BG_FILE_NO = BF.FILE_NO AND BF.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE M.MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND M.MBR_USE_YN = 'Y';

SELECT M.*, -- 프로필 이미지 정보 (별칭: PF_) PF.FILE_ORG_NM AS PF_FILE_ORG_NM, PF.FILE_SAVE_NM AS PF_FILE_SAVE_NM, PF.FILE_PATH AS PF_FILE_PATH, PF.FILE_EXT AS PF_FILE_EXT, PF.FILE_SIZE AS PF_FILE_SIZE, PF.FILE_MIME_TYPE AS PF_FILE_MIME_TYPE, PF.FILE_TYPE AS PF_FILE_TYPE,
-- 배경 이미지 정보 (별칭: BG_) BF.FILE_ORG_NM AS BG_FILE_ORG_NM, BF.FILE_SAVE_NM AS BG_FILE_SAVE_NM, BF.FILE_PATH AS BG_FILE_PATH, BF.FILE_EXT AS BG_FILE_EXT, BF.FILE_SIZE AS BG_FILE_SIZE, BF.FILE_MIME_TYPE AS BG_FILE_MIME_TYPE, BF.FILE_TYPE AS BG_FILE_TYPE FROM MEMBER M -- 프로필 파일 조인 LEFT JOIN FILE PF ON M.MBR_PROFILE_FILE_NO = PF.FILE_NO AND PF.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' -- 배경 파일 조인 LEFT JOIN FILE BF ON M.MBR_PROFILE_BG_FILE_NO = BF.FILE_NO AND BF.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE M.MBR_EMAIL = #{email} AND M.MBR_USE_YN = 'Y';
